intent: Private health-insurance (PKV) application with a deeply nested medical-history section: every Yes answer surfaces a follow-up free-text and a date-range pair, ending in a GDPR Art-9 consent.
notes: Stratum insurance-health. Adversarial fixture: every Yes on the medical-history radio cascades two follow-up validations. Anchors the upper bound on conditional-validation density in the suite.
